ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-functions-host
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-functions-host
Language: c%23
The host/runtime that powers Azure Functions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/data-api-builder
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/data-api-builder
Language: c%23
Data API builder provides modern REST, GraphQL endpoints and MCP tools to your Azure Databases and on-prem stores.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cyanfish/naps2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cyanfish/naps2
Language: c%23
Scan documents to PDF and more, as simply as possible.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/efcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/efcore
Language: c%23
EF Core is a modern object-database mapper for .NET. It supports LINQ queries, change tracking, updates, and schema migrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: duplicati/duplicati
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/duplicati/duplicati
Language: c%23
Store securely encrypted backups in the cloud!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: googlesamples/unity-jar-resolver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: c%23
Unity plugin which resolves Android & iOS dependencies and performs version management

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hadashiA/VContainer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hadashiA/VContainer
Language: c%23
The extra fast, minimum code size, GC-free DI (Dependency Injection) library running on Unity Game Engine.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jellyfin/jellyfin

URL: https://github.com/jellyfin/jellyfin

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/aspire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/aspire
Language: c%23
Aspire is the tool for code-first, extensible, observable dev and deploy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/garnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/garnet
Language: c%23
Garnet is a remote cache-store from Microsoft Research that offers strong performance (throughput and latency), scalability, storage, recovery, cluster sharding, key migration, and replication features. Garnet can work with existing Redis clients.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/ParticleEffectForUGUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/ParticleEffectForUGUI
Language: c%23
Render particle effect in UnityUI(uGUI). Maskable, sortable, and no extra Camera/RenderTexture/Canvas.
